auth_admin_welcome: вң… Authorization successful! Hello, Super Admin. рҹ‘‘ You are logged in as Super Administrator.
auth_not_linked: в„№пёҸ Your account is registered, but you are not currently linked to any family. рҹ’Ў If this is an error, press {btn_support} below to notify the administrator.
auth_already: вң… You are already authorized. Main menu loaded.
auth_welcome:
Hi! I'm GradeSentinel. To get started, I need to verify that you're in our database.

Please press the button below to share your contact.
auth_placeholder: Press the button below to authorize
auth_role_admin: рҹ‘‘ You are logged in as Super Administrator.
auth_role_head: рҹҸ  You are logged in as Family Head.
auth_role_parent: I will now send you notifications about new grades. рҹ’Ў How it works: вҖў The bot checks the diary every 5 minutes вҖў You will receive a notification for each new grade вҖў Press {btn_grades} to see all grades for today
auth_not_linked_contact:
в„№пёҸ Hello, {name}.
Your number has been verified, but you are not currently linked to any family. Please wait for administrator action.
auth_phone_not_found:
вқҢ Sorry, your phone number was not found in our database.
Please contact the administrator to register.
rate_limited: вҸі Too many requests. Please wait a few seconds.
status_global: рҹӣ° Global System Status рҹ‘Ҙ Total families: {families} рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§вҖҚрҹ‘Ұ Registered parents: {parents} рҹҺ“ Active students: {students} рҹ”„ Processed records: {history_records} вҡҷпёҸ Monitoring: Active
status_user: рҹ“Ҡ Your Statistics рҹҸ  Families: {families} рҹҺ“ Children linked: {students} рҹ”„ History records: {history_records} рҹ’Ў The bot actively checks your children's diaries every 5 minutes.
admin_help: рҹӣ  GradeSentinel Admin Panel Use the buttons at the bottom to navigate between sections. The bot automatically removes old menus to keep the chat clean.
admin_no_access: вӣ” You don't have access to this command.
admin_no_families: рҹ“ӯ No families in the database yet.
admin_families_list: рҹ“Ӣ All families: Select a family to manage:
admin_confirm_delete: Are you sure? This will delete all children and relatives from this family.
family_create_title:
рҹҸ— *Create new family*

Enter the family name (surname):
family_name_empty: вқҢ Name cannot be empty. Try again /add_family
family_choose_head: рҹ“қ Family: {name} Do you want to become the head of this family or assign someone else?
family_account_not_found: вқҢ Your account was not found in the database. Please authorize first.
family_created_self: вң… Family '{name}' created! You are assigned as the head. You can now use рҹҸ  My Family to manage it.
family_error: вқҢ An error occurred while creating the family. Please try again later.
family_fio_too_short: вқҢ Name is too short. Try again /add_family
family_phone_invalid: вқҢ Invalid phone format. Must be 12 digits (starting with 998). Try again /add_family
family_head_only: вӣ” This command is only available for family heads.
family_select:
рҹҸ  You are the head of multiple families.

Please select a family to manage:
family_delete_prompt: Select who to *remove* from the family:
family_head_no_delete: вҡ пёҸ Cannot remove the family head
child_enter_url:
Send a link to the child's Google Sheet.
Or press 'Cancel':
child_url_invalid: вқҢ Invalid Google Sheet link. Make sure it contains /spreadsheets/d/
child_url_no_id: вқҢ Could not extract sheet ID from the link.
child_limit_reached: вҡ пёҸ Limit reached: the family already has {count} children (maximum 5).
child_added: вң… Child successfully added! рҹ‘Ө Name: {name} рҹ“Ҡ Status: Monitoring activated рҹ’Ў You can check grades anytime using the '{btn_grades}' button
child_add_error: вқҢ An error occurred while adding the child. Check the link and try later.
member_enter: Enter the relative's full name and phone number (separated by space): Example: Ivanov Ivan 998901234567 Or press 'Cancel'.
member_added: вң… Relative {name} added to the family.
member_add_error: вқҢ Error adding relative. Check the data format and try again.
grades_no_students: в„№пёҸ You have no linked students. Contact the administrator.
grades_fetch_error: вҡ пёҸ Could not fetch data for {name}.
grades_today_none: рҹ“Ҡ No records for today yet.
notif_streak: рҹ”Ҙ That's {count} fives in a row!
bot_alive: вң… Bot is active No new grades received today. I'm monitoring the diary and will notify you as soon as a new entry appears.
support_unavailable: рҹ”§ Support is temporarily unavailable (group not configured).
support_prompt: рҹ“қ Technical Support Describe your question, suggestion or issue. You can send text or photos. The administrator will respond as soon as possible.
support_sent: вң… Message sent! Thank you for your feedback. The administrator has received your message and will reply here.
support_send_error: вқҢ An error occurred while sending the message. Please try again later.
support_reply_ok: вң… Reply successfully delivered to user!
support_reply_fail: вқҢ Delivery error: user has blocked the bot or has been deleted.
broadcast_prompt: рҹ“ў News Broadcast Mode Send a message (text, photo or video) to broadcast to all registered users. You will have a chance to confirm before sending.
broadcast_confirm: Ready to send this message to all users in the database?
broadcast_no_message: вқҢ Broadcast message not found. Please try again.
ai_unavailable: рҹ”§ AI analytics temporarily unavailable (API key not configured).
ai_no_students: в„№пёҸ You have no linked students for analysis.
ai_loading: рҹӨ– Analyzing grades... This may take a few seconds.
ai_not_enough_data: рҹ“Ҡ {name} в„№пёҸ Not enough data for analysis (need at least 2 grades in 14 days).
ai_prompt: You are a school AI analyst. Analyze the grades of student {name} for the last {days} days. Respond STRICTLY in this format (use HTML tags for bold): рҹ“Ҡ Summary: [number] grades | Average: [X.X] 5 вҖ” [N] | 4 вҖ” [N] | 3 вҖ” [N] | 2 вҖ” [N] вң… Strengths: [subjects with best grades and scores] вҡ пёҸ Attention: [subjects with 3s/2s, specific facts] вҖ” [brief explanation of patterns if any] рҹ’Ў Recommendation: [1-2 specific tips for parents, no generic advice like 'hire a tutor'] RULES: - Count grades accurately, do not make mistakes with numbers - Write ONLY in English - Do NOT use markdown (** or #), only HTML tags - Use max 3 emojis (рҹ“Ҡ вң… вҡ пёҸ рҹ’Ў вҖ” only at block starts) - If there are few grades вҖ” say so, do not invent trends - Be specific: name subjects and scores, avoid filler - Entire response вҖ” no more than 8 lines Grades: {grades}
lang_select: рҹҢҗ Р’СӢРұРөСҖРёСӮРө СҸР·СӢРә / Tilni tanlang / Select language:
